title: Require Service Private Alias Configuration
forbids: a private service/API package-import alias owned by another repository component, the wrong owner kind, or a target outside the owner's service interior
why: Private alias spelling must not conceal a cross-project edge or create a second public dependency surface.
remediate: Use only #<owner>-service/* in services/<owner> or #<owner>-api/* in plugins/server/api/<owner>, mapped to ./src/service/* or ./src/service/*.ts.
message: Private service/API aliases must remain owner-local import-map entries.
